mapper.insert: insert into todos (user_id, category_id, title, memo, due_date, due_time, priority, is_flagged, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{memo}, #{dueDate}, #{dueTime}, #{priority}, #{isFlagged}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update todos set category_id = #{categoryId}, title = #{title}, memo = #{memo}, due_date = #{dueDate}, due_time = #{dueTime}, priority = #{priority}, is_flagged = #{isFlagged}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update todos set is_completed = #{isCompleted}, completed_at = now(), updated_at = now() where id = #{todoId}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, category_id, title, memo, due_date, due_time, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, created_at, updated_at from todos where id = #{todoId}
select id, user_id, category_id, title, memo, due_date, due_time, priority, is_flagged, is_completed, completed_at, created_at, updated_at from todos order by due_date desc, due_time
